Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.mediator

Class StarInfo

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.mediator.StarInfo
public class StarInfo extends Object
This class contains information about a star. Some or all of its members may be absent, so each is null by default.

  • Constructor Details

    • StarInfo

      public StarInfo(AbstractObservationRetriever retriever, String designation, String auid, Double period, Double epoch, String varType, String spectralType, String discoverer, RAInfo ra, DecInfo dec, Integer obsCount)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      retriever - The observation retriever that knows about the source of observations. May be null! setRetriever() can be called after construction.
      designation - A name or designation for the star; may be null.
      auid - The star's unique identifier (AAVSO unique ID).
      period - The star's period, if known.
      epoch - The star's (corresponding to period for phase plot purposes) epoch, if known, as a Heliocentric Julian Date.
      varType - The variable's type, if known.
      spectralType - The spectral type, if known.
      discoverer - The discoverer of the star, if known.
      ra - The object's Right Acscension.
      dec - The object's Declination.
      obsCount - The count of observations for this object.

    • StarInfo

      public StarInfo(AbstractObservationRetriever retriever, String designation, String auid)
      Constructor. All but designation and AUID are null.
      Parameters:
      retriever - The observation retriever that knows about the source of observations. May be null! setRetriever() can be called after construction.
      designation - A name or designation for the star.
      auid - The star's unique identifier (AAVSO unique ID).

    • StarInfo

      public StarInfo(AbstractObservationRetriever retriever, String designation)
      Constructor. All but designation is null.
      Parameters:
      retriever - The observation retriever that knows about the source of observations. May be null! setRetriever() can be called after construction.
      designation - A name or designation for the star.

    • StarInfo

      public StarInfo(String designation, String auid, Double period, Double epoch, String varType, String spectralType, String discoverer, RAInfo ra, DecInfo dec, Integer obsCount)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      designation - A name or designation for the star.
      auid - The star's unique identifier (AAVSO unique ID).
      period - The star's period, if known.
      epoch - The star's (corresponding to period for phase plot purposes) epoch, if known, as a Heliocentric Julian Date.
      varType - The variable's type, if known.
      spectralType - The spectral type, if known.
      discoverer - The discoverer of the star, if known.
      ra - The object's Right Acscension.
      dec - The object's Declination.
      obsCount - The count of observations for this object.

    • StarInfo

      public StarInfo(String designation, String auid)
      Constructor. All but designation and AUID are null.
      Parameters:
      designation - A name or designation for the star.
      auid - The star's unique identifier (AAVSO unique ID).
